# **Good Business  
Isn’t Built in a Day.**
And it's never built alone. When your organization is at an inflection point, Founded Partners is the ally you need to navigate it successfully.
[ Let's Talk ](https://www.foundedpartners.com/contact-us)
* * *
### **Comprehensive Support Tailored for Founders**
At Founded Partners, our seasoned team works directly with you to provide hands-on support, founder advisory, strategic consulting, and specialized financial services. Our partners bring deep expertise to every engagement, personally guiding you through each critical phase of your business journey.
[ Our Services ](https://www.foundedpartners.com/services-for-founders)
### You Deserve Experience and Ability.
Because entrepreneurial success is rarely achieved alone.
#### 25+
companies founded
**100+**
**35+**
acquisitions supported.
**$3B+**
companies advised.
in market cap created
[ Let's Talk ](https://www.foundedpartners.com/contact-us)
* * *
## “Adam is driven by a clear set of values and when he commits, he invests himself fully. Rarely have I seen an individual who can so quickly build trust with others — and maintain that trust over time.”
Mike Henry   
Dean, School of Business and Economics, Thompson Rivers University
* * *
## "Matt's leadership in transforming organizations constrained by inefficient policies and processes into growing and profitable teams makes him an outstanding asset to any company."
Michael Clarke  
CMO, Infrascale

### Real Expertise, Real Results
Founded Partners works with growth-oriented founders and entrepreneurial leaders facing critical business moments. Our experienced professionals deliver personalized, hands-on guidance spanning strategic advisory, financial management, capital raising, and wealth structuring. Unlike traditional consultancies, our team consists solely of seasoned leaders who have personally guided organizations through significant growth, successful exits, and complex challenges. Our direct partner involvement means practical, credible advice tailored specifically to your unique situation—ensuring you achieve tangible, sustainable results.
#### Ready to Advance Your Business?
Contact us to discuss how Founded Partners can provide the specialized support your business needs to thrive.
[ Let's Talk ](https://www.foundedpartners.com/contact-us)
Founded Partners Inc.
